name: Kinship Colour Palette
description: A visual reference of all Kinship design token swatches — brand colors, subject colors, and CSS variable names.
prompt: Build a small prototype showing the Kinship colour palette as design token swatches.
full_prompt: Build a small prototype showing the Kinship colour palette as design token swatches.
what_made_it_special: Internal worktree test prototype — built to validate the parallel worktree strategy. Shows all Kinship design tokens (ink, cream, mid, dim, and the four subject colours) as labelled swatches with CSS variable names and hex values.
design_decisions: Built as a parallel worktree test alongside type-scale to validate the git worktree isolation strategy
Shows 8 swatches: 4 brand tokens (ink, cream, mid, dim) and 4 subject tokens (reading/blue, math/orange, writing/green, science/purple)
Each swatch displays the token name, CSS variable, and hex value — reference-first design
Hover state reveals a copy-to-clipboard button for the CSS variable
tech_notes: Fully static client component — no backend, no API routes
Uses Tailwind + CSS variables defined in globals.css

slack_thread.name: Hermes
slack_thread.content: Self-initiated test prototype — built to validate the parallel git worktree strategy. Created alongside type-scale to confirm two simultaneous worktree builds don't conflict.
